steps.title: Look for a concrete example
steps.content: The goal is to provide an example of a position in Cecchetti method ballet. The notes identify third position as one such position.

steps.title: Reject general statements
steps.content:
• Choice A mentions dance positions generally but not Cecchetti method.
  • Choice B mentions Cecchetti method but not a specific position.
  • Choice D describes body positions broadly without giving the example.

steps.title: Name the position
steps.content: The remaining choice directly states that third position is an example of a position in Cecchetti method ballet. The answer is C.
